description.ko: 첨단 소나와 내압 장갑을 장착한 AQUA-5는 빛이 닿지 않는 심해층의 미답지 영역을 탐사하며, 희귀한 생물 발광 생명체와 고대 지질 구조를 기록합니다.
description.en: Equipped with advanced sonar and pressure-resistant plating, AQUA-5 explores the uncharted depths of the midnight zone, documenting rare bioluminescent life and ancient geological formations.

prompt: A high-tech submersible robot named AQUA-5, sleek hydrodynamic metallic chassis with glowing azure optical sensors, navigating through a dark oceanic trench, bioluminescent flora and floating particles in the background, hydrothermal vents emitting steam, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed 8k render, sci-fi aesthetic.
